overview.description: The Vanguard ESG U.S. Corporate Bond ETF (VCEB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an index of US investment-grade corporate bonds of varying maturities, selected based on certain ESG traits provided by MSCI ESG research. VCEB was launched on Sep 22, 2020 and is issued by Vanguard.
infoTable: Bloomberg MSCI US Corporate SRI Select Index
